title: PulteGroup Announces Chief Operating Officer Succession Plan
text: ATLANTA--(BUSINESS WIRE)--PulteGroup, Inc. (NYSE: PHM), the nation's third largest homebuilder, announced today that John Chadwick, Executive Vice President and Chief Operating Officer, has announced his plans to retire next year.

title: Pulte Homes Announces Its First Active Adult Community in Denver
text: DENVER--(BUSINESS WIRE)--Pulte Homes, one of the nation's largest homebuilders, continues its expansion in Denver with its first active adult community in the market, Hilltop at Inspiration. title: Del Webb Opens Third Houston-Area Community: Del Webb Fulshear
text: HOUSTON--(BUSINESS WIRE)--Del Webb, the nation's leading builder of active adult communities for those 55 and older, will grand open its newest community Del Webb Fulshear on Saturday, October 8th.
